description: Hulking, fur-covered goblinoids moving with terrifying stealth despite their massive size.
subraces: Ambush predators lurking in shadows, crushing victims with a single devastating blow.
Bear-blooded brutes even larger than their kin, with thick pelts and bone-crushing strength.
White-furred mountain stalkers hunting in blizzards and terrifying alpine travelers.
Cunning warlords ruling through fear, keeping goblinoid tribes in line with raw power.
